name: Bruce Johnstone
abstract: Bruce Johnstone (born September 1, 1943) is a New Zealand-American jazz baritone saxophonist. He also plays alto saxophone, bass clarinet, and flute.

interviews.title: Bruce Johnstone interviewed by Monk Rowe, Dunkirk, New York, October 11, 2013

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Stan Kenton and His Orchestra, and Maynard Ferguson and His Orchestra

about_quotes.speaker: Bobby Militello
about_quotes.evidence: I’ve got tunes that you wrote that I’ve done out when you were with Bruce and doing all that stuff and everything else.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bobby Militello interviewed by Monk Rowe, Buffalo, New York, October 14, 2002
